data.title: Import tasks from other SkogAI repositories
data.description:
Identify and import relevant issues from other SkogAI repositories.

- [ ] Inventory existing SkogAI repos with open issues
- [ ] Determine which issues are relevant to skogai-2-0
- [ ] Import using skogai-todo import --source github --repo
- [ ] Link cross-repo dependencies where needed
